basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant post. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under Anna University Recruitment 2026 for the Project Assistant position.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. (Electrical and Electronics Engineering - First Class) and M.E./M.Tech/M.S. (Power Electronics and Drives, Power Systems Engineering)
qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech. (Electrical and Electronics Engineering - First Class) M.E./M.Tech/M.S. (Power Electronics and Drives, Power Systems Engineering)

salary_details.details: Consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Assistant position at Anna University is 12-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a B.E./B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (First Class) and an M.E./M.Tech/M.S. in Power Electronics and Drives or Power Systems Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the given address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test and an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this Anna University recruitment?
faq.answer: The job is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMRG250970.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact for any queries regarding the application?
faq.answer: For any queries, you can contact Dr. S. Priyavarthini, Assistant Professor, Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering, College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University, Chennai-600025.
